node.text:
Zina is not only physical. It begins with small actions we often overlook.

What we say, what we listen to, what we look at, all of it matters.

Be mindful of your tongue, because words can lead the heart somewhere it should not go.

Save this as a reminder to protect yourself.

“Whoever fasts the month of Ramadan and then follows it with six days of fasting in the month of Shawwal, it will be as if he has fasted for the entire year.”
Source: Ṣaḥīḥ Muslim 1164
Grade: Sahih (authentic) according to Muslim
@sarafathima7946 I read someplace that we can combine niyah of fasting these six days with Monday and Thursday fasts if we want to. Is that for real?
you forgot "zina of the ears" . example : listening to haram music
@hzzwani thank you for bringing it up sister. May Allah reward you for your goodness, ameen.
How can you do zina if you're married?
If you cheat on your spouse - it's zina
@matersaevacedia ohhh I gotcha. Thank you for the explanation
Can you explain the difference between look of lust and look of love?
